caption: In a sports stadium with rows of red seating, a group of people are gathered near a railing. Several individuals are wearing athletic gear, including blue jerseys and red shorts. One person in a blue shirt with the number 9 on the back stands near others who are wearing red and white striped athletic wear. In the background, a large red banner features white Arabic script and the phrase "CERVEZAS ALHAMBRA" repeated twice. The logo for Real Madrid is visible in the upper right of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the people shift positions; a man in a red shirt moves toward the right, while others stand or sit in the red seats. Some individuals are wearing blue shirts and black shorts, and a few are in casual clothing. The scene remains focused on the interaction and movement of the group within the red-seated spectator area.
